# Codex Bugfix Template

## Goal
Describe the user-visible bug and expected outcome.

## Scope
List allowed files or app areas. Name anything explicitly out of scope.

## Investigation
- Reproduce or inspect the failing path.
- Identify the smallest behavioral cause.
- Check related shared helpers before editing.

## Fix Rules
- Keep the fix targeted.
- Do not refactor unrelated architecture.
- Do not change Firebase rules unless requested.

## Acceptance Tests
- List the exact manual or automated checks required.
- Include any user/account state needed for verification.

## Output Required
## What Changed
## Files Modified
## Tests Run
## Known Risks
